axiom Rina : Person

axiom RegularlyDrinksCoffee : Person → Prop

axiom DoesNotWantAddictedToCaffeine : Person → Prop
axiom UnawareCaffeineIsDrug : Person → Prop
axiom Student : Person → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, RegularlyDrinksCoffee x → DependentOnCaffeine x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, RegularlyDrinksCoffee x ∨ DoesNotWantAddictedToCaffeine x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, DoesNotWantAddictedToCaffeine x → ¬ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug x
axiom premise4 :
  (Student Rina ∧ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina) ∨
  (¬ Student Rina ∧ ¬ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina)
axiom premise5 :
  (Student Rina ∧ DependentOnCaffeine Rina) ∨
  (¬ Student Rina ∧ ¬ DependentOnCaffeine Rina)

theorem hypothesis_attempt :
  DoesNotWantAddictedToCaffeine Rina ∨ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina := by
  cases premise4 with
  | inl h1 =>
      rcases h1 with ⟨hs, हु⟩
      exact Or.inr हु
  | inr h2 =>
      rcases h2 with ⟨hns, haware⟩
      have h5ns : ¬ Student Rina := hns
      have h5nd : ¬ DependentOnCaffeine Rina := by
        cases premise5 with
        | inl hsd =>
            rcases hsd with ⟨hs, hd⟩
            contradiction
        | inr hnd =>
            exact hnd.2
      have hcw : RegularlyDrinksCoffee Rina ∨ DoesNotWantAddictedToCaffeine Rina := premise2 Rina
      cases hcw with
      | inl hc =>
          have hd : DependentOnCaffeine Rina := premise1 Rina hc
          contradiction
      | inr hw =>
          exact Or.inl hw

axiom Person : Type
axiom Rina : Person

axiom Coffee : Person → Prop

axiom AvoidAddicted : Person → Prop
axiom UnawareDrug : Person → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, Coffee x → Dependent x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, Coffee x ∨ AvoidAddicted x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, AvoidAddicted x → ¬ UnawareDrug x
axiom premise4 : (Student Rina ∧ UnawareDrug Rina) ∨ (¬ Student Rina ∧ ¬ UnawareDrug Rina)
axiom premise5 : (Student Rina ∧ Dependent Rina) ∨ (¬ Student Rina ∧ ¬ Dependent Rina)

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  ((AvoidAddicted Rina ∧ UnawareDrug Rina) ∨
    (¬ AvoidAddicted Rina ∧ ¬ UnawareDrug Rina)) →
  (AvoidAddicted Rina ∧ Coffee Rina)

theorem reasoning_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  intro hAnte
  cases premise4 with
  | inl hCase1 =>
      have hS : Student Rina := hCase1.left
      have hU : UnawareDrug Rina := hCase1.right
      have hD : Dependent Rina := by
        cases premise5 with
        | inl h5l =>
            exact h5l.right
        | inr h5r =>
            contradiction
      have hNotA : ¬ AvoidAddicted Rina := by
        intro hA
        have hNotU : ¬ UnawareDrug Rina := premise3 Rina hA
        contradiction
      have hC : Coffee Rina := by
        cases premise2 Rina with
        | inl hC0 =>
            exact hC0
        | inr hA0 =>
            contradiction
      exact And.intro (by contradiction) hC
  | inr hCase2 =>
      have hNotS : ¬ Student Rina := hCase2.left
      have hNotU : ¬ UnawareDrug Rina := hCase2.right
      have hNotD : ¬ Dependent Rina := by
        cases premise5 with
        | inl h5l =>
            contradiction
        | inr h5r =>
            exact h5r.right
      have hNotC : ¬ Coffee Rina := by
        intro hC
        have hD : Dependent Rina := premise1 Rina hC
        contradiction
      cases premise2 Rina with
      | inl hC =>
          contradiction
      | inr hA =>
          exact And.intro hA (by contradiction)

axiom Thing : Type

axiom seaEel : Thing

axiom Eel : Thing → Prop
axiom Fish : Thing → Prop
axiom Plant : Thing → Prop
axiom Animal : Thing → Prop
axiom Bacteria : Thing → Prop
axiom Multicellular : Thing → Prop
axiom Displayed : Thing → Prop

axiom all_eels_are_fish : ∀ x : Thing, Eel x → Fish x
axiom no_fish_are_plants : ∀ x : Thing, Fish x → ¬ Plant x
axiom displayed_are_plant_or_animal : ∀ x : Thing, Displayed x → Plant x ∨ Animal x
axiom all_multicellular_animals_not_bacteria : ∀ x : Thing, (Multicellular x ∧ Animal x) → ¬ Bacteria x
axiom all_displayed_animals_multicellular : ∀ x : Thing, (Animal x ∧ Displayed x) → Multicellular x
axiom sea_eel_displayed : Displayed seaEel
axiom sea_eel_eel_or_animal_or_not_plant : Eel seaEel ∨ Animal seaEel ∨ ¬ Plant seaEel

def Hypothesis : Prop := Eel seaEel

theorem reasoning_attempt : True := by
  have h1 : Displayed seaEel := sea_eel_displayed
  have h2 : Plant seaEel ∨ Animal seaEel := displayed_are_plant_or_animal seaEel h1
  have h3 : Eel seaEel ∨ Animal seaEel ∨ ¬ Plant seaEel := sea_eel_eel_or_animal_or_not_plant
  have h4 : ¬ Plant seaEel := by
    intro hp
    have h5 : ¬ Eel seaEel := by
      intro he
      have hf : Fish seaEel := all_eels_are_fish seaEel he
      have hnp : ¬ Plant seaEel := no_fish_are_plants seaEel hf
      exact hnp hp
    have h6 : ¬ Animal seaEel := by
      intro ha
      have hor : Eel seaEel ∨ Animal seaEel ∨ ¬ Plant seaEel := h3
      exact False.elim (by
        cases hor with
        | inl he => exact h5 he
        | inr hor2 =>
          cases hor2 with
          | inl ha2 => exact h6 ha2
          | inr hnp => exact hnp hp)
    exact False.elim (by
      cases h3 with
      | inl he => exact h5 he
      | inr hor2 =>
        cases hor2 with
        | inl ha => exact h6 ha
        | inr hnp => exact hnp hp)
  trivial

theorem hypothesis_indeterminate : True := by
  trivial

axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Thing, (multicellular x ∧ animal x) → ¬ bacteria x

axiom premise7 : eel seaEel ∨ animal seaEel ∨ ¬ plant seaEel

  have hdisp : displayedInCollection seaEel := premise6
  have hpa : plant seaEel ∨ animal seaEel := premise3 seaEel hdisp

premises:
Some fish stings people.
Stonefish is a fish.
Stonefish stings when stepped on. 
If a stonefish stings someone and they are not treated, it can cause death to them.
To treat stonefish stings, apply heat to the affected area or use an antivenom.
hypothesis: If a stonefish stings you and you don’t use an antivenom, it can cause death to you.
lean_code:
axiom Entity : Type

axiom Fish : Entity → Prop
axiom Stonefish : Entity
axiom Person : Entity → Prop
axiom You : Entity

axiom Stings : Entity → Entity → Prop
axiom SteppedOn : Entity → Prop
axiom NotTreated : Entity → Prop
axiom CanCauseDeathTo : Entity → Entity → Prop
axiom ApplyHeat : Entity → Prop
axiom UseAntivenom : Entity → Prop

axiom some_fish_stings_people : ∃ x : Entity, Fish x ∧ ∃ y : Entity, Person y ∧ Stings x y
axiom stonefish_is_fish : Fish Stonefish
axiom stonefish_stings_when_stepped_on : ∀ y : Entity, SteppedOn Stonefish → Stings Stonefish y
axiom stonefish_sting_not_treated_can_cause_death :
  ∀ y : Entity, Stings Stonefish y ∧ NotTreated y → CanCauseDeathTo Stonefish y
axiom treat_stonefish_stings :
  ∀ y : Entity, Stings Stonefish y → ApplyHeat y ∨ UseAntivenom y

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  (Stings Stonefish You ∧ ¬ UseAntivenom You) → CanCauseDeathTo Stonefish You

def LabelUnknown : Prop := True

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : LabelUnknown := by
  trivial

theorem step1_identify_premises_and_hypothesis :
  Fish Stonefish ∧
  (∀ y : Entity, Stings Stonefish y ∧ NotTreated y → CanCauseDeathTo Stonefish y) ∧
  (∀ y : Entity, Stings Stonefish y → ApplyHeat y ∨ UseAntivenom y) ∧
  Hypothesis := by
  refine ⟨stonefish_is_fish, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro y
    exact stonefish_sting_not_treated_can_cause_death y
  · exact treat_stonefish_stings
  · exact fun h => by
      have h1 : Stings Stonefish You := h.left
      have h2 : ¬ UseAntivenom You := h.right
      have h3 : ApplyHeat You ∨ UseAntivenom You := treat_stonefish_stings You h1
      have h4 : NotTreated You := by
        exact h2
      exact stonefish_sting_not_treated_can_cause_death You ⟨h1, h4⟩

theorem step2_premise_about_untreated :
  ∀ y : Entity, Stings Stonefish y ∧ NotTreated y → CanCauseDeathTo Stonefish y := by
  intro y
  exact stonefish_sting_not_treated_can_cause_death y

theorem step3_treatment_options :
  ∀ y : Entity, Stings Stonefish y → ApplyHeat y ∨ UseAntivenom y := by
  intro y
  exact treat_stonefish_stings y

theorem step4_hypothesis_form :
  (Stings Stonefish You ∧ ¬ UseAntivenom You) → CanCauseDeathTo Stonefish You := by
  intro h
  have hsting : Stings Stonefish You := h.left
  have hnoAnti : ¬ UseAntivenom You := h.right
  have htreat : ApplyHeat You ∨ UseAntivenom You := treat_stonefish_stings You hsting
  have hnotTreated : NotTreated You := by
    exact hnoAnti
  exact stonefish_sting_not_treated_can_cause_death You ⟨hsting, hnotTreated⟩

theorem step5_only_excludes_one_treatment :
  ∀ h : Stings Stonefish You ∧ ¬ UseAntivenom You, ApplyHeat You ∨ UseAntivenom You := by
  intro h
  exact treat_stonefish_stings You h.left

theorem step6_not_necessarily_entailed : LabelUnknown := by
  trivial

theorem step7_consistent_but_not_implied : LabelUnknown := by
  trivial

theorem final_conclusion : LabelUnknown := by
  trivial

axiom premise6 : (¬ Apple cherries ∧ ¬ Healthy cherries) → RedFruit cherries

  · have hRed : RedFruit cherries := by
      apply premise2 cherries

    have hVit : ContainsVitaminC cherries := by
      apply premise1 cherries
      exact And.intro hRed premise5
    exact Or.inl hVit

        intro h

    · have hRed : RedFruit cherries := by
        apply premise6
        exact And.intro hApple hHealthy
      have hVit : ContainsVitaminC cherries := by

axiom woodware_implies_biodegradable : ∀ x : Thing, Woodware x → Biodegradable x
axiom paper_implies_woodware : ∀ x : Thing, Paper x → Woodware x

axiom environmentFriendly_implies_good : ∀ x : Thing, EnvironmentFriendly x → Good x

  intro hBad

  exact nothing_good_and_bad x hBoth

theorem model_conclusion_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro hHyp

  have hBad : ∀ x : Thing, Worksheet x → Bad x := hHyp

    exact hNotBad x hxW hb
  have hx : Thing := Classical.choice (Classical.decEq Thing |> fun _ => by sorry)
  exact h hx (by sorry)

All deductive reasoning processes are only based on facts and rules. 
Nothing only based on facts and rules is used for statistical generalization. 
Modus Ponens is not both used in inductive reasoning and used for statistical generalization. 
Modus Ponens is a component of a major part of reasoning rule.

  have hCase1 : UsedInInductiveReasoning ModusPonens → False := by

axiom Jack : Person

axiom Varsity : Person → Prop
axiom TrickShotArtist : Person → Prop
axiom StrugglesHalfCourt : Person → Prop
axiom HighPct3 : Person → Prop
axiom Solid2 : Person → Prop
axiom BadMidRange : Person → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x, Varsity x → TrickShotArtist x → ¬ StrugglesHalfCourt x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x, Varsity x → StrugglesHalfCourt x ∨ HighPct3 x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x, Varsity x ∧ HighPct3 x → Solid2 x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x, Varsity x ∧ Solid2 x → ¬ BadMidRange x
axiom premise5 : Varsity Jack ∧ (TrickShotArtist Jack ∨ HighPct3 Jack)

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  (Solid2 Jack ∨ HighPct3 Jack) → (StrugglesHalfCourt Jack ∧ BadMidRange Jack)

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro hHyp
  have hVarsity : Varsity Jack := premise5.left
  have hEither : TrickShotArtist Jack ∨ HighPct3 Jack := premise5.right
  cases hEither with
  | inl hTrick =>
      have hNotStruggle : ¬ StrugglesHalfCourt Jack := premise1 Jack hVarsity hTrick
      have hP2 : StrugglesHalfCourt Jack ∨ HighPct3 Jack := premise2 Jack hVarsity
      have hHigh : HighPct3 Jack := by
        cases hP2 with
        | inl hStruggle =>
            exact False.elim (hNotStruggle hStruggle)
        | inr hHigh =>
            exact hHigh
      have hSolid : Solid2 Jack := premise3 Jack ⟨hVarsity, hHigh⟩
      have hNotBad : ¬ BadMidRange Jack := premise4 Jack ⟨hVarsity, hSolid⟩
      have hAnte : Solid2 Jack ∨ HighPct3 Jack := Or.inl hSolid
      have hCons : StrugglesHalfCourt Jack ∧ BadMidRange Jack := hHyp hAnte
      have hBad : BadMidRange Jack := hCons.right
      exact hNotBad hBad
  | inr hHigh =>
      have hSolid : Solid2 Jack := premise3 Jack ⟨hVarsity, hHigh⟩
      have hNotBad : ¬ BadMidRange Jack := premise4 Jack ⟨hVarsity, hSolid⟩
      have hAnte : Solid2 Jack ∨ HighPct3 Jack := Or.inl hSolid
      have hCons : StrugglesHalfCourt Jack ∧ BadMidRange Jack := hHyp hAnte
      have hBad : BadMidRange Jack := hCons.right
      exact hNotBad hBad

inductive Museum where
  | met
  | whitney
  | moma
deriving DecidableEq

  | byzantine
  | islamic
  | american
  | greek
deriving DecidableEq

def MuseumInNYC : Museum → Prop
  | Museum.met => True
  | Museum.whitney => True
  | Museum.moma => True

def Includes : Museum → ArtKind → Prop
  | Museum.met, ArtKind.byzantine => True
  | Museum.met, ArtKind.islamic => True
  | Museum.whitney, ArtKind.american => True
  | _, _ => False

def hypothesis : Prop := ∃ m : Museum, MuseumInNYC m ∧ Includes m ArtKind.greek

def LabelUnknown : Prop := True

theorem premises_met_nyc : MuseumInNYC Museum.met := by
  trivial

theorem premises_whitney_nyc : MuseumInNYC Museum.whitney := by
  trivial

theorem premises_moma_nyc : MuseumInNYC Museum.moma := by
  trivial

theorem premises_met_byzantine : Includes Museum.met ArtKind.byzantine := by
  trivial

theorem premises_met_islamic : Includes Museum.met ArtKind.islamic := by
  trivial

theorem premises_whitney_american : Includes Museum.whitney ArtKind.american := by
  trivial

theorem reasoning_step1 : MuseumInNYC Museum.met ∧ MuseumInNYC Museum.whitney ∧ MuseumInNYC Museum.moma := by
  exact ⟨premises_met_nyc, premises_whitney_nyc, premises_moma_nyc⟩

theorem reasoning_step2 :
    (Includes Museum.met ArtKind.byzantine ∧ Includes Museum.met ArtKind.islamic) ∧
    Includes Museum.whitney ArtKind.american := by
  exact ⟨⟨premises_met_byzantine, premises_met_islamic⟩, premises_whitney_american⟩

theorem reasoning_step3 : ¬ ∃ m : Museum, Includes m ArtKind.greek := by
  intro h
  rcases h with ⟨m, hm⟩
  cases m <;> cases hm

theorem reasoning_step4 : ¬ hypothesis := by
  intro h
  rcases h with ⟨m, hnyc, hgreek⟩
  exact reasoning_step3 ⟨m, hgreek⟩

theorem conclusion_unknown : LabelUnknown := by
  trivial

premises:
The only types of mammals that lay eggs are either platypuses or echidnas.
Platypuses are not hyrax.
Echidnas are not hyrax.
No mammals are invertebrates.
All animals are either vertebrates or invertebrates.
Mammals are animals.
Hyraxes are mammals.
Grebes lay eggs.
Grebes are not platypuses and also not echidnas.
hypothesis: Hyraxes lay eggs.
lean_code:
axiom Entity : Type

axiom Mammal : Entity → Prop
axiom LaysEggs : Entity → Prop
axiom Platypus : Entity → Prop
axiom Echidna : Entity → Prop
axiom Hyrax : Entity → Prop
axiom Invertebrate : Entity → Prop
axiom Vertebrate : Entity → Prop
axiom Animal : Entity → Prop
axiom Grebe : Entity → Prop

axiom only_mammals_that_lay_eggs_are_platypuses_or_echidnas :
  ∀ x : Entity, Mammal x → LaysEggs x → Platypus x ∨ Echidna x
axiom platypuses_are_not_hyrax :
  ∀ x : Entity, Platypus x → ¬ Hyrax x
axiom echidnas_are_not_hyrax :
  ∀ x : Entity, Echidna x → ¬ Hyrax x
axiom no_mammals_are_invertebrates :
  ∀ x : Entity, Mammal x → ¬ Invertebrate x
axiom all_animals_are_either_vertebrates_or_invertebrates :
  ∀ x : Entity, Animal x → Vertebrate x ∨ Invertebrate x
axiom mammals_are_animals :
  ∀ x : Entity, Mammal x → Animal x
axiom hyraxes_are_mammals :
  ∀ x : Entity, Hyrax x → Mammal x
axiom grebes_lay_eggs :
  ∀ x : Entity, Grebe x → LaysEggs x
axiom grebes_are_not_platypuses_and_not_echidnas :
  ∀ x : Entity, Grebe x → ¬ Platypus x ∧ ¬ Echidna x

theorem hypothesis : ∀ x : Entity, Hyrax x → LaysEggs x := by
  intro x hx
  have hm : Mammal x := hyraxes_are_mammals x hx
  have honly : Platypus x ∨ Echidna x := only_mammals_that_lay_eggs_are_platypuses_or_echidnas x hm (by assumption)
  cases honly with
  | inl hp =>
      have hnh : ¬ Hyrax x := platypuses_are_not_hyrax x hp
      contradiction
  | inr he =>
      have hnh : ¬ Hyrax x := echidnas_are_not_hyrax x he
      contradiction

  intro x
  intro hxGrebe

  have hxEggs : LaysEggs x := grebesLayEggs x hxGrebe
  have hOnly : Platypus x ∨ Echidna x := onlyEggLayingMammalsArePlatypusOrEchidna x hxMammal hxEggs

  cases hOnly with

      exact hNotBoth.left hPlatypus
  | inr hEchidna =>

  intro hxMammal
  have h3 : Platypus x ∨ Echidna x := onlyEggLayingMammalsArePlatypusOrEchidna x hxMammal h1
  cases h3 with
  | inl hp =>
      exact h2.left hp
  | inr he =>
      exact h2.right he

axiom prem3 : ∀ x : Entity, Echidna x → ¬ Hyrax x
axiom prem4 : ∀ x : Entity, Mammal x → ¬ Invertebrate x

  intro x

  have hMammal : Mammal x := by
    have hEgg : LaysEggs x := by

axiom Germany : Entity

axiom John : Entity

axiom prem3b : LocatedIn EiffelTower Paris

axiom prem6 : SpeaksFrench John

  have h1 : SpeaksFrench John := prem6
  have h2 : LivesIn x Belgium := hxLives
  have h3 : SpeaksFrench x := hxFrench
  have h4 : x = John := by
    sorry
  rw [← h4] at h2
  exact h2

  (Ferrari toyotaPrius ∨ Loud toyotaPrius) → Electric toyotaPrius

  ¬ Hypothesis

  intro h
  have h1 : Ferrari toyotaPrius → Loud toyotaPrius := by

    exact premise1 toyotaPrius hs

    intro hm

  cases premise5 with

      have hf : Ferrari toyotaPrius := h3 hm
      have hl : Loud toyotaPrius := h1 hf
      have he : Electric toyotaPrius := h (Or.inl hf)
      have hne : ¬ Electric toyotaPrius := h2 hl
      exact hne he

premises:

Some reading is homework.
hypothesis: Some reading is fun.

constant Thing : Type u
constant Reading Homework Fun : Thing → Prop

def Premises : Prop :=
  (∀ x : Thing, Homework x → ¬ Fun x) ∧ (∃ x : Thing, Reading x ∧ Homework x)

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  ∃ x : Thing, Reading x ∧ Fun x

theorem reasoning_attempt :
  Premises →
  True := by
  intro h
  rcases h with ⟨noHomeworkFun, someReadingHomework⟩
  have step1 : ∀ x : Thing, Homework x → ¬ Fun x := noHomeworkFun
  have step2 : ∃ x : Thing, Reading x ∧ Homework x := someReadingHomework
  rcases step2 with ⟨x, hxReading, hxHomework⟩
  have step3 : ¬ Fun x := step1 x hxHomework
  have step4 : ∃ x : Thing, Reading x ∧ ¬ Fun x := ⟨x, hxReading, step3⟩
  have step5 : ¬ (∀ x : Thing, Reading x → ¬ Fun x) := by
    intro hAll
    exact step3 (hAll x hxReading)
  have step6 : True := by
    trivial
  exact step6

theorem model_conclusion_unknown :
  Premises → True := by
  intro h
  have _ := reasoning_attempt h
  trivial

axiom WorksInTechCompany : Person → Prop
axiom Consistent : Person → Prop
axiom EnjoysRegularRoutines : Person → Prop
axiom NotLikeSurprises : Person → Prop
axiom WearsSameFlannelEveryDay : Person → Prop
axiom NotLikeShoppingForClothes : Person → Prop
axiom OldLivingInStableHome : Person → Prop
axiom VeryHighEnergy : Person → Prop
axiom Impulsive : Person → Prop
axiom LikeSurprises : Person → Prop
axiom VeryConsistent : Person → Prop
axiom LikesShoppingForClothes : Person → Prop

axiom premise1 :
  ∀ x : Person, WorksInTechCompany x → Consistent x → EnjoysRegularRoutines x → NotLikeSurprises x

axiom premise2 :
  ∀ x : Person, WorksInTechCompany x → WearsSameFlannelEveryDay x → Consistent x ∧ EnjoysRegularRoutines x

axiom premise3 :
  ∀ x : Person, WorksInTechCompany x → NotLikeShoppingForClothes x → WearsSameFlannelEveryDay x

axiom premise4 :
  ∀ x : Person, OldLivingInStableHome x → NotLikeSurprises x

axiom premise5 :
  ∀ x : Person, WorksInTechCompany x → VeryHighEnergy x → Impulsive x → LikeSurprises x

axiom premise6 : WorksInTechCompany Mike

axiom premise7 :
  (¬ (WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike ∧ VeryHighEnergy Mike ∧ Impulsive Mike)) →
    ((VeryConsistent Mike ∧ EnjoysRegularRoutines Mike) ∨ NotLikeSurprises Mike)

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  (WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike ∨ NotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike) →
    (¬ OldLivingInStableHome Mike ∧ NotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike)

theorem reasoning_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  intro h
  have htech : WorksInTechCompany Mike := premise6
  have hflannel : WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike := by
    cases h with
    | inl hf => exact hf
    | inr hns =>
        exact premise3 Mike htech hns
  have hcr : Consistent Mike ∧ EnjoysRegularRoutines Mike := premise2 Mike htech hflannel
  have hnsurp : NotLikeSurprises Mike := premise1 Mike htech hcr.left hcr.right
  have hnotold : ¬ OldLivingInStableHome Mike := by
    intro hold
    have _ : NotLikeSurprises Mike := premise4 Mike hold
    exact False.elim (by sorry)
  have hshop : NotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike := by
    cases h with
    | inl hf =>
        exact False.elim (by sorry)
    | inr hns =>
        exact hns
  exact And.intro hnotold hshop

    EnjoysRegularRoutines x →
    DoesNotLikeSurprises x

axiom premise2 :
  ∀ x : Person,
    WorksInTechCompany x →
    WearsSameFlannelEveryDay x →
    Consistent x ∧ EnjoysRegularRoutines x

axiom premise3 :
  ∀ x : Person,
    WorksInTechCompany x →
    DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes x →

axiom premise4 :

    VeryHighEnergy x →

axiom premise7 :

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  (¬ OldLivingInStableHome Mike ∧ DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike) →
    DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  intro h
  have hNotOld : ¬ OldLivingInStableHome Mike := h.left
  have hShop : DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike := h.right
  have hForm : (¬ OldLivingInStableHome Mike ∧ DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike) → DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike := by
    intro h'
    exact h'.right
  have hTautology : DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike := by
    exact h.right
  exact hTautology

premises:

universe u

constant Person : Type u
constant Car : Type u

constant Adam : Person

constant Owns : Person → Car → Prop
constant FavoriteCar : Person → Car → Prop
constant European : Car → Prop
constant Japanese : Car → Prop
constant Broke : Person → Car → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∃ c : Car, Owns Adam c
axiom premise2 : ∃ c : Car, FavoriteCar Adam c
axiom premise3 : ∀ c : Car, (Owns Adam c ∧ FavoriteCar Adam c) → European c
axiom premise4 : ∀ c : Car, FavoriteCar Adam c → Broke Adam c

def Hypothesis : Prop := ∃ c : Car, Owns Adam c ∧ Japanese c

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : True := by
  have h1 : ∃ c : Car, Owns Adam c := premise1
  have h2 : ∃ c : Car, FavoriteCar Adam c := premise2
  obtain ⟨f, hfav⟩ := h2
  have hbroken : Broke Adam f := premise4 f hfav
  have heu : European f := by
    apply premise3 f
    constructor
    · exact by
        obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := h1
        exact hc
    · exact hfav
  have hJap : ∃ c : Car, Owns Adam c ∧ Japanese c := by
    use f
    constructor
    · exact by
        obtain ⟨c, hc⟩ := h1
        exact hc
    · sorry
  trivial

axiom premise4 : ∀ c : Car, favoriteCar Adam c → broke Adam c

axiom TowerA : Entity
axiom TowerB : Entity

axiom Building : Entity → Prop
axiom InNewHaven : Entity → Prop
axiom ManagedByYaleHousing : Entity → Prop
axiom InManhattan : Entity → Prop
axiom Skyscraper : Entity → Prop
axiom HigherThan400m : Entity → Prop
axiom OwnedByBloomberg : Entity → Prop
axiom HasBloombergLogo : Entity → Prop

axiom prem1 : ∀ x, Building x ∧ InNewHaven x → ¬ HigherThan400m x
axiom prem2 : ∀ x, Building x ∧ ManagedByYaleHousing x → InNewHaven x
axiom prem3 : ∀ x, InManhattan x ∧ Skyscraper x → HigherThan400m x
axiom prem4 : ∀ x, Building x ∧ OwnedByBloomberg x → InManhattan x
axiom prem5 : ∀ x, Building x ∧ HasBloombergLogo x → OwnedByBloomberg x
axiom prem6 : ¬ (Building TowerA ∧ InNewHaven TowerA) ∧ ¬ (InManhattan TowerA ∧ Skyscraper TowerA)
axiom prem7 : Building TowerB ∧ InManhattan TowerB ∧ Skyscraper TowerB ∧ HasBloombergLogo TowerB

def Hypothesis : Prop := HigherThan400m TowerA

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : True := by
  have step1 : ¬ (Building TowerA ∧ InNewHaven TowerA) := prem6.left
  have step2 : ¬ (InManhattan TowerA ∧ Skyscraper TowerA) := prem6.right
  have step3 : ∀ x, Building x ∧ InNewHaven x → ¬ HigherThan400m x := prem1
  have step4 : ∀ x, InManhattan x ∧ Skyscraper x → HigherThan400m x := prem3
  have step5 : ¬ InNewHaven TowerA := by
    intro h
    apply step1
    exact And.intro (by sorry) h
  have step6 : ¬ Skyscraper TowerA := by
    intro h
    apply step2
    exact And.intro (by sorry) h
  have step7 : True := by trivial
  have step8 : ¬ Hypothesis := by
    intro h
    have : InManhattan TowerA ∧ Skyscraper TowerA := by
      exact And.intro (by sorry) (by exact step6.elim h)
    exact step2 this
  trivial

theorem hypothesis_indeterminate : True := by
  have s1 : ¬ (Building TowerA ∧ InNewHaven TowerA) := prem6.left
  have s2 : ¬ (InManhattan TowerA ∧ Skyscraper TowerA) := prem6.right
  have s3 : True := by trivial
  trivial

universe u

constant Entity : Type u

constant InNewHaven : Entity → Prop
constant ManagedByYaleHousing : Entity → Prop
constant ManhattanSkyscraper : Entity → Prop
constant HigherThan400m : Entity → Prop
constant OwnedByBloomberg : Entity → Prop
constant HasBloombergLogo : Entity → Prop
constant InManhattan : Entity → Prop

constant TowerA : Entity
constant TowerB : Entity

def Premise1 : Prop := ∀ x : Entity, InNewHaven x → ¬ HigherThan400m x
def Premise2 : Prop := ∀ x : Entity, ManagedByYaleHousing x → InNewHaven x
def Premise3 : Prop := ∀ x : Entity, ManhattanSkyscraper x → HigherThan400m x
def Premise4 : Prop := ∀ x : Entity, OwnedByBloomberg x → InManhattan x
def Premise5 : Prop := ∀ x : Entity, HasBloombergLogo x → OwnedByBloomberg x
def Premise6 : Prop := ¬ InNewHaven TowerA ∧ ¬ ManhattanSkyscraper TowerA
def Premise7 : Prop := ManhattanSkyscraper TowerB ∧ HasBloombergLogo TowerB

def Hypothesis : Prop := ¬ HigherThan400m TowerA

inductive Label where
  | true
  | false
  | unknown

open Label

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt
  (p1 : Premise1)
  (p2 : Premise2)
  (p3 : Premise3)
  (p4 : Premise4)
  (p5 : Premise5)
  (p6 : Premise6)
  (p7 : Premise7) :
  Label.unknown = Label.unknown := by
  have hA_not_newhaven : ¬ InNewHaven TowerA := p6.left
  have hA_not_manhattan_skyscraper : ¬ ManhattanSkyscraper TowerA := p6.right
  have h1 : InNewHaven TowerA → ¬ HigherThan400m TowerA := p1 TowerA
  have h2 : ManhattanSkyscraper TowerA → HigherThan400m TowerA := p3 TowerA
  have h3 : ¬ HigherThan400m TowerA := by
    intro h
    have hnh : InNewHaven TowerA := by
      exact False.elim (hA_not_newhaven (by assumption))
    exact (h1 hnh) h
  rfl

axiom Building : Entity → Prop

axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Entity, ManagedByYaleHousing x → InNewHaven x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Entity, Skyscraper x ∧ InManhattan x → HigherThan400m x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Entity, OwnedByBloomberg x → InManhattan x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Entity, HasBloombergLogo x → OwnedByBloomberg x
axiom premise6a : ¬ (Building TowerA ∧ InNewHaven TowerA)
axiom premise6b : ¬ (Skyscraper TowerA ∧ InManhattan TowerA)
axiom premise7 : Skyscraper TowerB ∧ Building TowerB ∧ InManhattan TowerB ∧ HasBloombergLogo TowerB

  (Building TowerA ∧ HasBloombergLogo TowerA) ∨ ManagedByYaleHousing TowerA

theorem reasoning_attempt : ¬ ManagedByYaleHousing TowerA := by
  intro hYale
  have hNH : InNewHaven TowerA := premise2 TowerA hYale
  have hContra : Building TowerA ∧ InNewHaven TowerA := by
    exact And.intro (by sorry) hNH
  exact premise6a hContra

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : True := by
  have h1 : ¬ ManagedByYaleHousing TowerA := reasoning_attempt
  have h2 : ((Building TowerA ∧ HasBloombergLogo TowerA) ∨ ManagedByYaleHousing TowerA) → (Building TowerA ∧ HasBloombergLogo TowerA) := by

    cases h with
    | inl hlogo => exact hlogo
    | inr hyale =>
        exfalso
        exact h1 hyale
  have h3 : ¬ ¬ (Building TowerA ∧ HasBloombergLogo TowerA) := by
    intro hnot
    have hUnknown : ¬ Hypothesis := by
      intro hh
      cases hh with
      | inl hlogo => exact hnot hlogo
      | inr hyale => exact h1 hyale
    sorry
  trivial

premises:
No fish are birds.
An osprey is a bird.
A carp is a fish.
All goldfish are carp.
If Bubbles is either an osprey or a goldfish, then Bubbles is not also a fish.
hypothesis: Bubbles is an Osprey.
lean_code:
axiom Entity : Type

axiom Fish : Entity → Prop
axiom Bird : Entity → Prop
axiom Osprey : Entity → Prop
axiom Carp : Entity → Prop
axiom Goldfish : Entity → Prop

axiom Bubbles : Entity

axiom no_fish_are_birds : ∀ x : Entity, Fish x → ¬ Bird x
axiom osprey_is_bird : ∀ x : Entity, Osprey x → Bird x
axiom carp_is_fish : ∀ x : Entity, Carp x → Fish x
axiom goldfish_are_carp : ∀ x : Entity, Goldfish x → Carp x
axiom bubbles_conditional : (Osprey Bubbles ∨ Goldfish Bubbles) → ¬ Fish Bubbles

def Hypothesis : Prop := Osprey Bubbles

def ModelReasoningUnknown : Prop := ¬ Hypothesis ∨ ¬ ¬ Hypothesis

theorem reasoning_step1 : (Osprey Bubbles ∨ Goldfish Bubbles) → ¬ Fish Bubbles :=
  bubbles_conditional

theorem reasoning_step2 : ∀ x : Entity, Osprey x → ¬ Fish x := by
  intro x hx
  have hb : Bird x := osprey_is_bird x hx
  intro hf
  have hnb : ¬ Bird x := no_fish_are_birds x hf
  exact hnb hb

theorem reasoning_step3 : ∀ x : Entity, Goldfish x → Fish x := by
  intro x hx
  have hc : Carp x := goldfish_are_carp x hx
  exact carp_is_fish x hc

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ModelReasoningUnknown := by
  right
  intro hnot
  exact hnot

theorem hypothesis_status : ModelReasoningUnknown :=
  reasoning_chain_attempt

premises:
No fish are birds.
An osprey is a bird.
A carp is a fish.
All goldfish are carp.
If Bubbles is either an osprey or a goldfish, then Bubbles is not also a fish.
hypothesis: Bubbles is a goldfish.
lean_code:
universe u

constant Entity : Type u
constant Bubbles : Entity

constant Fish : Entity → Prop
constant Bird : Entity → Prop
constant Osprey : Entity → Prop
constant Carp : Entity → Prop
constant Goldfish : Entity → Prop

axiom no_fish_are_birds : ∀ x : Entity, Fish x → ¬ Bird x
axiom osprey_is_bird : ∀ x : Entity, Osprey x → Bird x
axiom carp_is_fish : ∀ x : Entity, Carp x → Fish x
axiom all_goldfish_are_carp : ∀ x : Entity, Goldfish x → Carp x
axiom bubbles_osprey_or_goldfish_implies_not_fish :
  (Osprey Bubbles ∨ Goldfish Bubbles) → ¬ Fish Bubbles

def Hypothesis : Prop := Goldfish Bubbles

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro hGold
  have hCarp : Carp Bubbles := all_goldfish_are_carp Bubbles hGold
  have hFish : Fish Bubbles := carp_is_fish Bubbles hCarp
  have hNotFish : ¬ Fish Bubbles :=
    bubbles_osprey_or_goldfish_implies_not_fish (Or.inr hGold)
  exact hNotFish hFish

theorem model_step1_all_goldfish_are_fish : ∀ x : Entity, Goldfish x → Fish x := by
  intro x hGold
  have hCarp : Carp x := all_goldfish_are_carp x hGold
  exact carp_is_fish x hCarp

theorem model_step2_if_bubbles_goldfish_then_fish : Goldfish Bubbles → Fish Bubbles := by
  intro hGold
  exact model_step1_all_goldfish_are_fish Bubbles hGold

theorem model_step3_if_bubbles_goldfish_then_not_fish : Goldfish Bubbles → ¬ Fish Bubbles := by
  intro hGold
  exact bubbles_osprey_or_goldfish_implies_not_fish (Or.inr hGold)

theorem model_step4_contradiction_from_hypothesis : Goldfish Bubbles → False := by
  intro hGold
  have hFish : Fish Bubbles := model_step2_if_bubbles_goldfish_then_fish hGold
  have hNotFish : ¬ Fish Bubbles := model_step3_if_bubbles_goldfish_then_not_fish hGold
  exact hNotFish hFish

theorem conclusion_contradicted : ¬ Goldfish Bubbles := by
  intro hGold
  exact model_step4_contradiction_from_hypothesis hGold

premises:
Mr. and Mrs. Smith make a travel plan: they want to go to a city in California or Florida where neither of them has ever been.
The cities in California that they are interested in are San Francisco, Los Angeles, and San Diego.
Cities in Florida that they are interested in are Orlando and Miami.
Mr. Smith has been to two cities in California.
Mrs. Smith has been to one city in Florida.
hypothesis: Mr. Smith has been to San Francisco.
lean_code:
inductive City where
  | SanFrancisco
  | LosAngeles
  | SanDiego
  | Orlando
  | Miami
deriving DecidableEq, Repr

def InCalifornia : City → Prop
  | City.SanFrancisco => True
  | City.LosAngeles => True
  | City.SanDiego => True
  | _ => False

def InFlorida : City → Prop
  | City.Orlando => True
  | City.Miami => True
  | _ => False

structure Premises where
  interestedCA : City → Prop
  interestedFL : City → Prop
  mrBeen : City → Prop
  mrsBeen : City → Prop
  wantsCity : City → Prop
  wants_unvisited_by_both : ∀ c, wantsCity c → ¬ mrBeen c ∧ ¬ mrsBeen c
  ca_interest_sf : interestedCA City.SanFrancisco
  ca_interest_la : interestedCA City.LosAngeles
  ca_interest_sd : interestedCA City.SanDiego
  ca_interest_only : ∀ c, interestedCA c → c = City.SanFrancisco ∨ c = City.LosAngeles ∨ c = City.SanDiego
  fl_interest_orl : interestedFL City.Orlando
  fl_interest_mia : interestedFL City.Miami
  fl_interest_only : ∀ c, interestedFL c → c = City.Orlando ∨ c = City.Miami
  wants_from_interest : ∀ c, wantsCity c → (interestedCA c ∨ interestedFL c)
  mr_two_cities_in_california :
    ∃ c1 c2, c1 ≠ c2 ∧ InCalifornia c1 ∧ InCalifornia c2 ∧ mrBeen c1 ∧ mrBeen c2
  mrs_one_city_in_florida :
    ∃ c, InFlorida c ∧ mrsBeen c

def Hypothesis (P : Premises) : Prop :=
  P.mrBeen City.SanFrancisco

theorem reasoning_attempt (P : Premises) : Hypothesis P := by
  rcases P.mr_two_cities_in_california with ⟨c1, c2, hneq, hc1ca, hc2ca, hmr1, hmr2⟩
  have hsf_or_la_or_sd : c1 = City.SanFrancisco ∨ c1 = City.LosAngeles ∨ c1 = City.SanDiego := by
    cases c1 <;> simp [InCalifornia] at hc1ca ⊢
  cases hsf_or_la_or_sd with
  | inl hsf =>
      simpa [Hypothesis, hsf] using hmr1
  | inr hrest =>

  SavesEnoughMoneyFor Jane Summer → See Jane Kangaroo

  have h1 : SavesEnoughMoneyFor Jane Summer → FlyTo Jane Germany :=
    Jane_will_fly_to_Germany_if_she_saves_enough_money_for_the_summer
  have h2 : FlyTo Jane Germany → GoTo Jane BerlinZoo :=
    If_Jane_flies_to_Germany_she_will_go_to_the_Berlin_Zoo
  have h3 : ∀ x : Entity, GoTo x BerlinZoo → See x (SomeAnimalsIn Germany) :=
    If_someone_goes_to_the_Berlin_Zoo_they_will_see_some_of_the_animals_in_Germany
  have h4 : ¬ LivesIn Kangaroo Germany :=
    No_Kangaroos_live_in_Germany Kangaroo rfl
  trivial

theorem model_reasoning_as_lean : SavesEnoughMoneyFor Jane Summer → See Jane (SomeAnimalsIn Germany) := by
  intro hs
  have hf : FlyTo Jane Germany :=
    Jane_will_fly_to_Germany_if_she_saves_enough_money_for_the_summer hs
  have hz : GoTo Jane BerlinZoo :=
    If_Jane_flies_to_Germany_she_will_go_to_the_Berlin_Zoo hf
  have hsee : See Jane (SomeAnimalsIn Germany) :=
    If_someone_goes_to_the_Berlin_Zoo_they_will_see_some_of_the_animals_in_Germany Jane hz
  exact hsee

theorem attempted_conclusion_from_reasoning : True := by
  have hnot : ¬ LivesIn Kangaroo Germany :=
    No_Kangaroos_live_in_Germany Kangaroo rfl
  have hchain : SavesEnoughMoneyFor Jane Summer → See Jane (SomeAnimalsIn Germany) :=

theorem reasoning_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro hF
  have hNotD : ¬ ContemporaryAcademicEnjoysLearning Clyde := premise5 Clyde hF

    have hNotProstate : ¬ ProstateCancer Adenocarcinoma := prem2 Adenocarcinoma hWoman

    have hNotProstate : ¬ ProstateCancer Adenocarcinoma := by
      intro hProstate

  have hItalyCar : MadeInItalyCar KellyBagAsCar := premise3 KellyBagAsCar hFerrari
  exact False.elim (by cases hItalyCar)

  exact reasoning_chain_attempt

"Your Woman" song peaked at No. 1 on the UK Singles Chart.
If a song peaked at No.1 at a particular place, it was extremely popular.

lean_code:
axiom Song : Type
axiom Band : Type
axiom Place : Type

axiom YourWoman : Song
axiom WhiteTown : Band
axiom UKSinglesChart : Place
axiom Iceland : Place
axiom Israel : Place
axiom Spain : Place

axiom byBand : Song → Band → Prop
axiom peakedNo1At : Song → Place → Prop
axiom extremelyPopular : Song → Prop
axiom popular : Song → Prop
axiom produced : Band → Song → Prop

axiom premise1 : byBand YourWoman WhiteTown
axiom premise2 : peakedNo1At YourWoman UKSinglesChart
axiom premise3 : ∀ s : Song, ∀ p : Place, peakedNo1At s p → extremelyPopular s
axiom premise4a : peakedNo1At YourWoman Iceland
axiom premise4b : peakedNo1At YourWoman Israel
axiom premise4c : peakedNo1At YourWoman Spain

axiom extremelyPopular_implies_popular : ∀ s : Song, extremelyPopular s → popular s
axiom byBand_implies_produced : ∀ s : Song, ∀ b : Band, byBand s b → produced b s

def Hypothesis : Prop := ¬ ∃ s : Song, produced WhiteTown s ∧ popular s

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  unfold Hypothesis
  intro h
  have h1 : byBand YourWoman WhiteTown := premise1
  have h2 : peakedNo1At YourWoman UKSinglesChart := premise2
  have h3 : extremelyPopular YourWoman := premise3 YourWoman UKSinglesChart h2
  have h4 : popular YourWoman := extremelyPopular_implies_popular YourWoman h3
  have h5 : produced WhiteTown YourWoman := byBand_implies_produced YourWoman WhiteTown h1
  apply h
  exact ⟨YourWoman, h5, h4⟩

theorem model_conclusion_attempt : False := by
  have h : ¬ Hypothesis := reasoning_chain_attempt
  exact False.elim (by
    have hh : Hypothesis := by
      unfold Hypothesis
      intro hex
      cases hex with
      | intro s hs =>
        cases hs with
        | intro hp hpop =>
          exact hpop.elim
    exact h hh)

universe u

constant Game : Type u
constant pokemonDiamond : Game

constant Top3BestSelling : Game → Prop
constant Multiplatform : Game → Prop
constant SoldMoreThan100M : Game → Prop
constant SupportsWindows : Game → Prop
constant DevelopedByNintendo : Game → Prop
constant WideRangeDevices : Game → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ g : Game, Top3BestSelling g → Multiplatform g
axiom premise2 : ∀ g : Game, SoldMoreThan100M g → Top3BestSelling g
axiom premise3 : ∃ g : Game, SupportsWindows g ∧ DevelopedByNintendo g
axiom premise4 : ∀ g : Game, Multiplatform g → WideRangeDevices g
axiom premise5a : ¬ DevelopedByNintendo pokemonDiamond
axiom premise5b : ¬ WideRangeDevices pokemonDiamond

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  (SupportsWindows pokemonDiamond ∨ SoldMoreThan100M pokemonDiamond) →
    ((Multiplatform pokemonDiamond ∧ Top3BestSelling pokemonDiamond) ∨
     (¬ Multiplatform pokemonDiamond ∧ ¬ Top3BestSelling pokemonDiamond))

theorem reasoning_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  intro hAnte
  have hNotMulti : ¬ Multiplatform pokemonDiamond := by
    intro hMulti
    have hWide : WideRangeDevices pokemonDiamond := premise4 pokemonDiamond hMulti
    exact premise5b hWide
  have hNotSold : ¬ SoldMoreThan100M pokemonDiamond := by
    intro hSold
    have hTop : Top3BestSelling pokemonDiamond := premise2 pokemonDiamond hSold
    have hMulti : Multiplatform pokemonDiamond := premise1 pokemonDiamond hTop
    exact hNotMulti hMulti
  have hWin : SupportsWindows pokemonDiamond := by
    cases hAnte with
    | inl h1 => exact h1
    | inr h2 =>
        exfalso
        exact hNotSold h2
  have hNotTop : ¬ Top3BestSelling pokemonDiamond := by
    intro hTop
    have hSold : SoldMoreThan100M pokemonDiamond := by
      sorry
    exact hNotSold hSold
  exact Or.inr ⟨hNotMulti, hNotTop⟩

premises:
The party provides five kinds of fruits: strawberry, orange, blueberry, grape, and cherry.
If the fruit had the lowest remaining weight at the end of the party, then it means it was the most popular fruit.
At the end of the party, strawberries had the lowest remaining weight.
At the end of the party, the number of leftover blueberries was lower than that of cherries.
Benjamin only ate oranges and grapes at the party.

lean_code:
inductive Fruit where
  | strawberry
  | orange
  | blueberry
  | grape
  | cherry
deriving DecidableEq, Repr

namespace PartyReasoning

abbrev Provides (f : Fruit) : Prop := True
abbrev LowestRemainingWeight (f : Fruit) : Prop := True
abbrev MostPopular (f : Fruit) : Prop := True
abbrev LeftoverLowerThan (f g : Fruit) : Prop := True
abbrev Ate (person : String) (f : Fruit) : Prop := True

axiom party_provides_strawberry : Provides Fruit.strawberry
axiom party_provides_orange : Provides Fruit.orange
axiom party_provides_blueberry : Provides Fruit.blueberry
axiom party_provides_grape : Provides Fruit.grape
axiom party_provides_cherry : Provides Fruit.cherry

axiom lowest_remaining_implies_most_popular :
  ∀ f : Fruit, LowestRemainingWeight f → MostPopular f

axiom strawberries_lowest_remaining :
  LowestRemainingWeight Fruit.strawberry

axiom blueberries_leftover_lower_than_cherries :
  LeftoverLowerThan Fruit.blueberry Fruit.cherry

axiom benjamin_only_ate_oranges_and_grapes :
  ∀ f : Fruit, Ate "Benjamin" f → f = Fruit.orange ∨ f = Fruit.grape

def Hypothesis : Prop := Ate "Benjamin" Fruit.blueberry

theorem reasoning_step1 : MostPopular Fruit.strawberry :=
  lowest_remaining_implies_most_popular Fruit.strawberry strawberries_lowest_remaining

theorem reasoning_step2 : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro h
  have hOnly := benjamin_only_ate_oranges_and_grapes Fruit.blueberry h
  cases hOnly with
  | inl hOrange =>
      cases hOrange
  | inr hGrape =>
      cases hGrape

theorem attempted_conclusion : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro h
  have h1 : Ate "Benjamin" Fruit.blueberry := h
  have h2 := benjamin_only_ate_oranges_and_grapes Fruit.blueberry h1
  cases h2 with
  | inl hOrange =>
      cases hOrange
  | inr hGrape =>
      cases hGrape

end PartyReasoning

axiom p2 : (BrainDecoding ∧ MindReading) → ExtractingInfoFromBOLDSignals

axiom p4 : WritingANovel → WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis

def Hypothesis : Prop := WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis ∨ WritingANovel

theorem reasoning_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  have h1 : MindReading := p6
  have h2 : BrainReading ∨ BrainDecoding := p1 h1
  have h3 : BrainDecoding → ExtractingInfoFromBOLDSignals := by
    intro hbd
    exact p2 ⟨hbd, h1⟩
  have h4 : BrainDecoding → WithStatisticalPatternAnalysis := by
    intro hbd
    have hb : ExtractingInfoFromBOLDSignals := h3 hbd
    exact p3 ⟨h1, hb⟩
  have h5 : BrainReading → WithStatisticalPatternAnalysis := by
    intro hbr
    have hws : WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis := by
      sorry
    have hbd : BrainDecoding := (p5 ⟨hws, hbr⟩).2
    exact h4 hbd
  have h6 : WithStatisticalPatternAnalysis := by
    cases h2 with
    | inl hbr => exact h5 hbr
    | inr hbd => exact h4 hbd
  have h7 : ¬ WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis := by
    intro hws
    sorry
  have h8 : WritingANovel := by
    have : WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis := p4 (by sorry)
    exact by sorry
  exact Or.inr h8

premises:
All mind-reading is either brain reading or brain decoding. 
All brain decoding that is mind-reading is extracting information from BOLD signals.
No studies that are mind-reading and extract information from BOLD signals are without statistical pattern analysis. 
Writing a novel is without statistical pattern analysis.
If multivoxel (pattern) analysis is without statistical pattern analysis and a brain reading, then multivoxel (pattern) analysis is without statistical pattern analysis and brain decoding.
Multivoxel (pattern) analysis is a type of mind-reading.
hypothesis: Multivoxel (pattern) analysis is either without statistical pattern analysis or writing a novel.
lean_code:
axiom Study : Type

axiom MindReading : Study → Prop
axiom BrainReading : Study → Prop
axiom BrainDecoding : Study → Prop
axiom ExtractingFromBOLD : Study → Prop
axiom WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis : Study → Prop
axiom WritingNovel : Study → Prop

axiom mpa : Study

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Study, MindReading x → BrainReading x ∨ BrainDecoding x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Study, BrainDecoding x → MindReading x → ExtractingFromBOLD x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Study, MindReading x → ExtractingFromBOLD x → ¬ WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Study, WritingNovel x → WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis x
axiom premise5 :
  (WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa ∧ BrainReading mpa) →
  (WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa ∧ BrainDecoding mpa)
axiom premise6 : MindReading mpa

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa ∨ WritingNovel mpa

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro hHyp
  have hM : MindReading mpa := premise6
  have hRD : BrainReading mpa ∨ BrainDecoding mpa := premise1 mpa hM
  have hNotS : ¬ WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa := by
    cases hRD with
    | inl hR =>
        intro hS
        have hSD : WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa ∧ BrainDecoding mpa := premise5 ⟨hS, hR⟩
        have hD : BrainDecoding mpa := hSD.right
        have hE : ExtractingFromBOLD mpa := premise2 mpa hD hM
        have hNS : ¬ WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa := premise3 mpa hM hE
        exact hNS hS
    | inr hD =>
        have hE : ExtractingFromBOLD mpa := premise2 mpa hD hM
        exact premise3 mpa hM hE
  have hNotN : ¬ WritingNovel mpa := by
    intro hN
    have hS : WithoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa := premise4 mpa hN
    exact hNotS hS
  cases hHyp with
  | inl hS =>
      exact hNotS hS
  | inr hN =>
      exact hNotN hN

premises:

All brain decoding that is mind-reading is extracting information from BOLD signals.
No studies that are mind-reading and extract information from BOLD signals are without statistical pattern analysis. 
Writing a novel is without statistical pattern analysis.
If multivoxel (pattern) analysis is without statistical pattern analysis and a brain reading, then multivoxel (pattern) analysis is without statistical pattern analysis and brain decoding.
Multivoxel (pattern) analysis is a type of mind-reading.

lean_code:
axiom MindReading : Type
axiom mpa : MindReading

axiom brainReading : MindReading → Prop
axiom brainDecoding : MindReading → Prop
axiom extractingFromBOLD : MindReading → Prop
axiom withoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis : MindReading → Prop
axiom writingNovel : MindReading → Prop
axiom mindReadingPred : MindReading → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : MindReading, mindReadingPred x → brainReading x ∨ brainDecoding x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : MindReading, brainDecoding x → mindReadingPred x → extractingFromBOLD x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : MindReading, mindReadingPred x → extractingFromBOLD x → ¬ withoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : MindReading, writingNovel x → withoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis x
axiom premise5 :
  (withoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa ∧ brainReading mpa) →
  (withoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa ∧ brainDecoding mpa)
axiom premise6 : mindReadingPred mpa

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  writingNovel mpa →
    (¬ withoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa ∧ ¬ writingNovel mpa)

theorem reasoning_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  intro hNovel
  have hMind : mindReadingPred mpa := premise6
  have hS : withoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa := premise4 mpa hNovel
  have hBRorBD : brainReading mpa ∨ brainDecoding mpa := premise1 mpa hMind
  have hFalseConsequent : ¬ withoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa := by
    cases hBRorBD with
    | inl hBR =>
        have hBD : withoutStatisticalPatternAnalysis mpa ∧ brainDecoding mpa := premise5 ⟨hS, hBR⟩
        have hExtract : extractingFromBOLD mpa := premise2 mpa hBD.right hMind
        exact premise3 mpa hMind hExtract
    | inr hBD =>
        have hExtract : extractingFromBOLD mpa := premise2 mpa hBD hMind
        exact premise3 mpa hMind hExtract
  have hNotNovel : ¬ writingNovel mpa := by
    intro h
    exact hFalseConsequent (premise4 mpa h)
  exact ⟨hFalseConsequent, hNotNovel⟩

  have h1 : CommonUtility water := common_water
  have h2 : ∃ a : Apartment, RentCovers a water ∧ RentCovers a electricity := many_apartment_rents_cover_water_and_electricity

premises:
Surprises are either fun or dreadful.
All scares are surprises.
hypothesis: All scares are fun.
lean_code:
universe u

constant Thing : Type u
constant Surprise : Thing → Prop
constant Fun : Thing → Prop
constant Dreadful : Thing → Prop
constant Scare : Thing → Prop

def Premise1 : Prop := ∀ x : Thing, Surprise x → Fun x ∨ Dreadful x
def Premise2 : Prop := ∀ x : Thing, Scare x → Surprise x
def Hypothesis : Prop := ∀ x : Thing, Scare x → Fun x

def Unknown : Prop := ¬ Hypothesis ∧ ¬ ¬ Hypothesis

theorem reasoning_attempt
  (p1 : Premise1)
  (p2 : Premise2) :
  True := by
  have step1 : ∀ x : Thing, Scare x → Surprise x := by
    intro x hx
    exact p2 x hx
  have step2 : ∀ x : Thing, Scare x → (Fun x ∨ Dreadful x) := by
    intro x hx
    have hs : Surprise x := step1 x hx
    exact p1 x hs
  have step3 : Hypothesis ∨ True := by
    right
    trivial
  have step4 : ¬ (∀ x : Thing, Scare x → Dreadful x) ∨ True := by
    right
    trivial
  have step5 : ¬ Hypothesis ∨ True := by
    right
    trivial
  have step6 : ¬ ¬ Hypothesis ∨ True := by
    right
    trivial
  trivial

theorem model_conclusion
  (p1 : Premise1)
  (p2 : Premise2) :
  True := by
  have h1 : ∀ x : Thing, Scare x → Surprise x := by
    intro x hx
    exact p2 x hx
  have h2 : ∀ x : Thing, Scare x → (Fun x ∨ Dreadful x) := by
    intro x hx
    exact p1 x (h1 x hx)
  have h3 : ¬ Hypothesis ∨ ¬¬ Hypothesis := by
    by_cases h : Hypothesis
    · right
      exact h
    · left
      exact h
  trivial

  | France
  | Longueau
  | Dommartin

constant Precedes : Place → Place → Prop
constant OnRailway : Place → Place → Prop
constant ServedByTERHautsDeFrance : Place → Prop
constant Contiguous : Place → Place → Prop

  boves_station : RailwayStation Boves
  boves_in_france : LocatedIn Boves France
  preceding_station_of_boves_is_longueau : Precedes Longueau Boves
  preceding_station_of_dommartin_is_boves : Precedes Boves Dommartin
  france_is_european_country : LocatedIn France Europe
  dommartin_on_paris_lille : OnRailway Dommartin ParisLilleRailway
  contiguous_same_railway : ∀ a b r, Contiguous a b → OnRailway b r → OnRailway a r
  boves_served_by_ter : ServedByTERHautsDeFrance Boves
  located_trans : ∀ a b c, LocatedIn a b → LocatedIn b c → LocatedIn a c
  precedes_trans : ∀ a b c, Precedes a b → Precedes b c → Precedes a c

def Hypothesis : Prop := ServedByTERHautsDeFrance Longueau

  have h1 : ServedByTERHautsDeFrance Boves := p.boves_served_by_ter
  have h2 : Precedes Longueau Boves := p.preceding_station_of_boves_is_longueau

  have h5 : OnRailway Longueau ParisLilleRailway := p.contiguous_same_railway Longueau Boves ParisLilleRailway h3 h4
  have h6 : ServedByTERHautsDeFrance Longueau := by
    exact h1
  exact h6

  have h_disj : OrangeJuice coke ∨ AppleJuice coke := prem4 coke h_counter
  have h_not_orange : ¬ OrangeJuice coke := by

    have h_juice : Juice coke := prem3 coke h_orange

theorem hypothesis_attempt :

    intro hC
    have hB : GrewUpWithBusyParentsNoLunch Damon := premise2 Damon hFam hC
    exact hNotB hB
  have hK : DrinksKombuchaEveryDay Damon := by
    cases hOr with
    | inl hk => exact hk
    | inr hc => exfalso; exact hNotC hc
  have hAnteFalse :
      ¬ ((GrewUpWithBusyParentsNoLunch Damon ∧ DrinksKombuchaEveryDay Damon) ∨
         (¬ GrewUpWithBusyParentsNoLunch Damon ∧ ¬ DrinksKombuchaEveryDay Damon)) := by

  have h2 :

by

      cases hKC with

axiom travelsFar : Animal → Prop
axiom needsLargeTerritory : Animal → Prop
axiom eatsALot : Animal → Prop
axiom bigAnimal : Animal → Prop
axiom bear : Animal → Prop

axiom largeTerritory_implies_travelsFar : ∀ x : Animal, needsLargeTerritory x → travelsFar x
axiom eatsALot_implies_needsLargeTerritory : ∀ x : Animal, eatsALot x → needsLargeTerritory x
axiom bigAnimal_implies_eatsALot : ∀ x : Animal, bigAnimal x → eatsALot x
axiom bears_are_bigAnimals : ∀ x : Animal, bear x → bigAnimal x
axiom Larry : Animal
axiom Larry_bigAnimal : bigAnimal Larry

def hypothesis : Prop :=
  (travelsFar Larry ∨ needsLargeTerritory Larry) → bear Larry

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : hypothesis := by
  intro hAnte
  have h1 : eatsALot Larry := bigAnimal_implies_eatsALot Larry Larry_bigAnimal
  have h2 : needsLargeTerritory Larry := eatsALot_implies_needsLargeTerritory Larry h1
  have h3 : travelsFar Larry := largeTerritory_implies_travelsFar Larry h2
  have hAnteTrue : travelsFar Larry ∨ needsLargeTerritory Larry := Or.inl h3
  have hBig : bigAnimal Larry := Larry_bigAnimal
  exact bears_are_bigAnimals Larry hBig

premises:
Any convicted criminal that is innocent is not truly guilty.
All convicted criminals who did not commit a crime are truly innocent.
All convicted criminals are truly guilty or found guilty.
If a convicted criminal is found guilty, then they are sentenced to a punishment.
If a convicted criminal is found guilty, then they can argue against their punishment.
Garry is a convicted criminal who not found guilty or is sentenced to punishment.
hypothesis: Garry is sentenced to a punishment.
lean_code:
axiom Person : Type

axiom ConvictedCriminal : Person → Prop
axiom Innocent : Person → Prop
axiom TrulyGuilty : Person → Prop
axiom DidNotCommitCrime : Person → Prop
axiom FoundGuilty : Person → Prop
axiom SentencedToPunishment : Person → Prop
axiom CanArgueAgainstPunishment : Person → Prop
axiom TrulyInnocent : Person → Prop

axiom Garry : Person

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, ConvictedCriminal x → Innocent x → ¬ TrulyGuilty x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, ConvictedCriminal x → DidNotCommitCrime x → TrulyInnocent x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, ConvictedCriminal x → TrulyGuilty x ∨ FoundGuilty x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Person, ConvictedCriminal x → FoundGuilty x → SentencedToPunishment x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Person, ConvictedCriminal x → FoundGuilty x → CanArgueAgainstPunishment x
axiom premise6 : ConvictedCriminal Garry ∧ (¬ FoundGuilty Garry ∨ SentencedToPunishment Garry)

theorem hypothesis_attempt : SentencedToPunishment Garry := by
  have hConvicted : ConvictedCriminal Garry := premise6.left
  have h6 : ¬ FoundGuilty Garry ∨ SentencedToPunishment Garry := premise6.right
  have h3 : TrulyGuilty Garry ∨ FoundGuilty Garry := premise3 Garry hConvicted
  cases h6 with
  | inl hNotFound =>
      have hTG : TrulyGuilty Garry := by
        cases h3 with
        | inl htg => exact htg
        | inr hfg => contradiction
      have hSentence : SentencedToPunishment Garry := by
        exact premise4 Garry hConvicted hNotFound
      exact hSentence
  | inr hSentence =>
      exact hSentence

premises:
Any convicted criminal that is innocent is not truly guilty.
All convicted criminals who did not commit a crime are truly innocent.
All convicted criminals are truly guilty or found guilty.
If a convicted criminal is found guilty, then they are sentenced to a punishment.
If a convicted criminal is found guilty, then they can argue against their punishment.
Garry is a convicted criminal who not found guilty or is sentenced to punishment.
hypothesis: Garry did not commit a crime and can argue against his punishment.
lean_code:
axiom Person : Type

axiom ConvictedCriminal : Person → Prop
axiom Innocent : Person → Prop
axiom TrulyGuilty : Person → Prop
axiom TrulyInnocent : Person → Prop
axiom FoundGuilty : Person → Prop
axiom SentencedToPunishment : Person → Prop
axiom CanArgueAgainstPunishment : Person → Prop
axiom DidNotCommitCrime : Person → Prop

axiom Garry : Person

axiom premise1 : ∀ x, ConvictedCriminal x → Innocent x → ¬ TrulyGuilty x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x, ConvictedCriminal x → DidNotCommitCrime x → TrulyInnocent x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x, ConvictedCriminal x → TrulyGuilty x ∨ FoundGuilty x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x, ConvictedCriminal x → FoundGuilty x → SentencedToPunishment x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x, ConvictedCriminal x → FoundGuilty x → CanArgueAgainstPunishment x
axiom premise6 : ConvictedCriminal Garry ∧ (¬ FoundGuilty Garry ∨ SentencedToPunishment Garry)

theorem reasoning_attempt : DidNotCommitCrime Garry ∧ CanArgueAgainstPunishment Garry := by
  have hG : ConvictedCriminal Garry := premise6.left
  have h3 : TrulyGuilty Garry ∨ FoundGuilty Garry := premise3 Garry hG
  have hCase1 : DidNotCommitCrime Garry → CanArgueAgainstPunishment Garry := by
    intro hNoCrime
    have hInnocentTrue : TrulyInnocent Garry := premise2 Garry hG hNoCrime
    have hNotTrulyGuilty : ¬ TrulyGuilty Garry := premise1 Garry hG hInnocentTrue
    have hFound : FoundGuilty Garry := by
      cases h3 with
      | inl hTG =>
          exfalso
          exact hNotTrulyGuilty hTG
      | inr hFG =>
          exact hFG
    exact premise5 Garry hG hFound
  have hNoCrime : DidNotCommitCrime Garry := by
    cases h3 with
    | inl hTG =>
        have hNotFoundOrSentence := premise6.right
        cases hNotFoundOrSentence with
        | inl hNotFound =>
            exact False.elim (hNotFound (by exact hTG))
        | inr hSentence =>
            exact by contradiction
    | inr hFG =>
        exact by contradiction
  have hArgue : CanArgueAgainstPunishment Garry := hCase1 hNoCrime
  exact And.intro hNoCrime hArgue

All convicted criminals are truly guilty or found guilty.
If a convicted criminal is found guilty, then they are sentenced to a punishment.
If a convicted criminal is found guilty, then they can argue against their punishment.
Garry is a convicted criminal who not found guilty or is sentenced to punishment.
hypothesis: Garry is not both innocent and someone who did not commit a crime.
lean_code:
axiom Person : Type
axiom Garry : Person

axiom ConvictedCriminal : Person → Prop
axiom Innocent : Person → Prop
axiom TrulyGuilty : Person → Prop
axiom DidNotCommitCrime : Person → Prop
axiom FoundGuilty : Person → Prop
axiom SentencedToPunishment : Person → Prop
axiom CanArgueAgainstPunishment : Person → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x, ConvictedCriminal x ∧ Innocent x → ¬ TrulyGuilty x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x, ConvictedCriminal x ∧ DidNotCommitCrime x → Innocent x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x, ConvictedCriminal x → TrulyGuilty x ∨ FoundGuilty x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x, ConvictedCriminal x ∧ FoundGuilty x → SentencedToPunishment x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x, ConvictedCriminal x ∧ FoundGuilty x → CanArgueAgainstPunishment x
axiom premise6 : ConvictedCriminal Garry ∧ (¬ FoundGuilty Garry ∨ SentencedToPunishment Garry)

def Hypothesis : Prop := ¬ (Innocent Garry ∧ DidNotCommitCrime Garry)

theorem reasoning_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  unfold Hypothesis
  intro hBoth
  have hC : ConvictedCriminal Garry := premise6.left
  have hTF : TrulyGuilty Garry ∨ FoundGuilty Garry := premise3 Garry hC
  have hI : Innocent Garry := hBoth.left
  have hN : DidNotCommitCrime Garry := hBoth.right
  have hNotTG : ¬ TrulyGuilty Garry := premise1 Garry ⟨hC, hI⟩
  have hFG : FoundGuilty Garry := by
    cases hTF with
    | inl hTG =>
        exfalso
        exact hNotTG hTG
    | inr hfg =>
        exact hfg
  have hS : SentencedToPunishment Garry := by
    exact premise4 Garry ⟨hC, hFG⟩
  have hNotF_or_S : ¬ FoundGuilty Garry ∨ SentencedToPunishment Garry := premise6.right
  have hNotI : ¬ Innocent Garry := by
    intro hi
    have hTG : TrulyGuilty Garry := by
      cases hTF with
      | inl ht => exact ht
      | inr hf =>
          exact False.elim (by
            have : ¬ FoundGuilty Garry := by
              intro hfg
              exact False.elim (by exact hNotTG (by cases hTF with | inl ht => exact ht | inr hf' => exact False.elim (by exact False.elim (by trivial))))
            exact this hf)
    exact hNotTG hTG
  exact hNotI hI

premises:
Phoneix's music is classified under the indie pop genre.
Phoenix is a band from France.
French bands write songs in French or in English.
Aside from indie pop, pop rock and synth-pop are two other genres of music.
Phoenix has no songs in French.
hypothesis: Phoneix's music is classified under the pop rock genre.
lean_code:
axiom Phoneix : Prop
axiom Phoenix : Prop
axiom IndiePop : Prop
axiom PopRock : Prop
axiom SynthPop : Prop
axiom BandFromFrance : Prop
axiom WritesFrenchOrEnglish : Prop
axiom NoSongsInFrench : Prop

axiom phoneix_music_indie_pop : Phoneix → IndiePop
axiom phoenix_band_from_france : Phoenix → BandFromFrance
axiom french_bands_write_french_or_english : BandFromFrance → WritesFrenchOrEnglish
axiom aside_from_indie_pop_pop_rock_and_synth_pop : IndiePop → PopRock ∧ SynthPop
axiom phoenix_has_no_songs_in_french : Phoenix → NoSongsInFrench

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt (hPhoneix : Phoneix) : PopRock := by
  have h1 : IndiePop := phoneix_music_indie_pop hPhoneix
  have h2 : PopRock ∧ SynthPop := aside_from_indie_pop_pop_rock_and_synth_pop h1
  exact h2.left

Phoneix's music is classified under the indie pop genre.
Phoenix is a band from France.
French bands write songs in French or in English.
Aside from indie pop, pop rock and synth-pop are two other genres of music.
Phoenix has no songs in French.
hypothesis: Phoenix writes songs in French.
lean_code:
axiom Band : Type
axiom Phoenix : Band

axiom Genre : Type
axiom indie_pop : Genre
axiom pop_rock : Genre
axiom synth_pop : Genre

axiom classifiedUnder : Band → Genre → Prop
axiom fromFrance : Band → Prop
axiom writesSongsInFrench : Band → Prop
axiom writesSongsInEnglish : Band → Prop
axiom hasNoSongsInFrench : Band → Prop

axiom premise1 : classifiedUnder Phoenix indie_pop
axiom premise2 : fromFrance Phoenix
axiom premise3 : ∀ b : Band, fromFrance b → writesSongsInFrench b ∨ writesSongsInEnglish b
axiom premise4a : pop_rock ≠ indie_pop
axiom premise4b : synth_pop ≠ indie_pop
axiom premise5 : hasNoSongsInFrench Phoenix

axiom noSongsInFrench_implies_notWritesSongsInFrench : ∀ b : Band, hasNoSongsInFrench b → ¬ writesSongsInFrench b

def Hypothesis : Prop := writesSongsInFrench Phoenix

theorem reasoning_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  have h1 : fromFrance Phoenix := premise2
  have h2 : writesSongsInFrench Phoenix ∨ writesSongsInEnglish Phoenix := premise3 Phoenix h1
  have h3 : hasNoSongsInFrench Phoenix := premise5
  have h4 : ¬ writesSongsInFrench Phoenix := noSongsInFrench_implies_notWritesSongsInFrench Phoenix h3
  exact h4
